descriptor: Compare 5 AI coding tools based on free and paid plans with browser actions.

value.raw: Compare 5 AI coding tools by free plan and paid plan. The agent must perform at least three visible browser actions, such as search, filter, sort, open product/detail pages, switch tabs, expand hidden content, or submit a form. Passive scraping from search snippets is not accepted. The final output must include a structured comparison table.

descriptor: Compare 5 AI coding tools: Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Codeium, Tabnine, Amazon Q Developer by free and paid plans.
Comparison of GitHub Copilot, Codeium, and Tabnine free vs paid plans.

value.raw: Compare GitHub Copilot, Codeium, and Tabnine free vs paid plans. Use browser on each tool's official pricing page with at least 3 visible actions per site (navigate, click pricing or expand plan details, scroll). Include a structured comparison table.
